news.title: AI use in UK hits 'tipping point' as companies scale up, Google exec says
news.description: [REUTERS] Adoption of artificial intelligence has reached a "tipping point" in Britain, as companies move from experimentation to large-scale deployment and ​start seeing returns, a Google Cloud executive said on Wednesday.
